mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLAN ( PLAN_DATE, TITLE, SPECIFIC_CONTENT, MEASURABLE_CONTENT, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT, RELEVANT_CONTENT, TIME_LIMIT, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{planDate}, #{title}, #{specificContent}, #{measurableContent}, #{achievableContent}, #{relevantContent}, #{timeLimit}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TIME_BLOCK ( PLAN_ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, CONTENT, MEMO, STATUS, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{content}, #{memo}, NVL(#{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'TODO'), SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT PLAN_ID, PLAN_DATE, TITLE, SPECIFIC_CONTENT, MEASURABLE_CONTENT, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT, RELEVANT_CONTENT, TIME_LIMIT, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM PLAN ORDER BY PLAN_DATE DESC, PLAN_ID DESC

SELECT PLAN_ID, PLAN_DATE, TITLE, SPECIFIC_CONTENT, MEASURABLE_CONTENT, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT, RELEVANT_CONTENT, TIME_LIMIT, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM PLAN WHERE TRUNC(PLAN_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY PLAN_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT PLAN_ID, PLAN_DATE, TITLE, SPECIFIC_CONTENT, MEASURABLE_CONTENT, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT, RELEVANT_CONTENT, TIME_LIMIT, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM PLAN WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId}
SELECT BLOCK_ID, PLAN_ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, CONTENT, MEMO, STATUS, CREATED_DATE FROM TIME_BLOCK WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId} ORDER BY START_TIME ASC, BLOCK_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE PLAN SET PLAN_DATE = #{planDate}, TITLE = #{title}, SPECIFIC_CONTENT = #{specificContent}, MEASURABLE_CONTENT = #{measurableContent}, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT = #{achievableContent}, RELEVANT_CONTENT = #{relevantContent}, TIME_LIMIT = #{timeLimit}, UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT PLAN_ID, PLAN_DATE, TITLE, SPECIFIC_CONTENT, MEASURABLE_CONTENT, ACHIEVABLE_CONTENT, RELEVANT_CONTENT, TIME_LIMIT, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM PLAN WHERE TRUNC(PLAN_DATE) = TO_DATE(#{planDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY PLAN_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
